title: TNTDisabler
description: Prevent TNT explosions and protect your world!
body:
[![AshCraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a75887d69106ed9eb2dd595176121f279523f184_0.webp)](https://www.ashcraft.cz/)

The TNTDisabler plugin is designed to enhance the safety and integrity of your Minecraft server by disabling all TNT explosions. This plugin is lightweight and efficient, ensuring that no TNT-related damage occurs, thus protecting your builds and minimizing griefing risks. [Here's how it works.](https://ashsource.ashkiano.com/resource-detail/20)

Check out AshSource for more plugins and resources [ashsource.ashkiano.com](https://ashsource.ashkiano.com/)
 
Are you a developer?
Join AshSource to share your work with a growing community! Get started now at [ashsource.ashkiano.com](https://ashsource.ashkiano.com/)
